fields.name: name
fields.description: A human-readable identifier for the agent planner.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the component's functionality.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the component.

fields.name: task
fields.description: The objective or goal to be achieved.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification or grouping of the agent planner.

fields.name: steps
fields.description: Ordered sequence of actions to achieve a goal.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Represents the certainty level of a prediction or result.

fields.name: relevantMemories
fields.description: References to memories deemed important for the task.
fields.synonyms: memory references, related memories, memory IDs

fields.name: memoryCount
fields.description: The number of memories associated with this planner.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Details about any errors encountered during processing.

fields.name: input
fields.description: Data provided as an initial value or parameter.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The text used as input for generating a response.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The output generated by the agent.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Identifies the source or origin of the data.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The identifier of the language model used.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The textual data associated with the planner's output.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: The area or domain this planner applies to.

fields.name: strength
fields.description: A numerical value representing the intensity or magnitude.

fields.name: pinned
fields.description: Indicates whether the item is marked as important.

fields.name: action
fields.description: The specific action to be performed.

fields.name: detail
fields.description: A more in-depth explanation or elaboration.

fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: The date and time when the event occurred.

fields.name: duration
fields.description: The length of time an operation took, typically in seconds.

fields.name: icon
fields.description: A visual representation, often a symbol or image.

fields.name: message
fields.description: The text content of the message being processed.

fields.name: notificationType
fields.description: Indicates the type of notification generated.

fields.name: lastAccessedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last access to the data.

effects: Classify this task into exactly one category.
Generate a numbered step-by-step execution plan.
Include a confidence score (0-100) for how likely this plan will succeed.

emits.description: Indicates a successful data save operation.
Indicates the modal window is being closed.
Indicates a failure to load the record data.
Signals that the modal's data has been successfully loaded.

events.name: Open
events.description: A request to display the modal window.

events.name: Close
events.description: Indicates the modal window is being closed.

events.name: Save
events.description: Indicates a successful data save operation.

events.name: ModalRecord load failed
events.description: Indicates a failure to load the record data.

events.name: ModalRecord loaded
events.description: Signals that the modal's data has been successfully loaded.

fields.label: Which fields appear in the form?
fields.description: Entity fields rendered as inputs inside the modal form.
fields.synonyms: form fields, inputs, editable fields, field list

detailSlot.label: Render slot
detailSlot.description: UI slot the modal renders into

detailPattern.label: Layout pattern
detailPattern.description: Pattern used to arrange the form body

mode.label: Is this for creating or editing?
mode.description: create = blank form; edit = pre-filled from the selected row.
mode.synonyms: form mode, create or edit, new or update, add or modify

icon.label: Which icon appears in the modal header?
icon.description: Lucide icon name shown next to the modal title.
icon.synonyms: header icon, modal icon, title icon

title.label: What should the modal heading say?
title.description: Heading displayed at the top of the modal.
title.synonyms: modal title, dialog heading, panel title, form title

fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-facing identifier for the modal.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the modal's content or function.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the record.

emits.description: Fired when AgentClassifier fails to load

children.description: Click Open to view details in a modal overlay.
children.title: Nothing open

children.description: Click Open to view details in a modal overlay.
children.title: Nothing open

fields.name: name
fields.description: A human-readable identifier for the agent classifier.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the agent's classification.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Indicates the current operational state of the classifier.

fields.name: input
fields.description: Data provided to the component for processing.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Represents the classification type or group.

fields.name: confidence
fields.description: Represents the certainty level of a classification result.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The identifier or path to the machine learning model.

fields.name: message
fields.description: The text content of the message being processed.

fields.name: notificationType
fields.description: Indicates the type of notification generated.

emits.description: Fired when AgentCompletion fails to load

children.description: Click Open to view details in a modal overlay.

fields.name: name
fields.description: A user-facing identifier for the completion.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the completion's purpose.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the process.

fields.name: prompt
fields.description: The text used as input to generate a completion.

fields.name: response
fields.description: The output or result generated by the agent.

fields.name: provider
fields.description: Identifies the source of the completion data.

fields.name: model
fields.description: The underlying model used for generating completions.

fields.name: error
fields.description: Details about any errors encountered during processing.

fields.name: message
fields.description: The text content of the completion message.

fields.name: notificationType
fields.description: Indicates the type of notification generated.

emits.description: Fired when the AgentMemory collection finishes loading; payload.data holds the list

fields.name: name
fields.description: A human-readable identifier for the memory.

fields.name: description
fields.description: A textual explanation of the memory's purpose or contents.

fields.name: status
fields.description: Current operational state of the component.

fields.name: content
fields.description: The data stored within the memory.

fields.name: category
fields.description: Classification or type of the memory data.

fields.name: strength
fields.description: A numerical value representing the intensity or magnitude.

fields.name: pinned
fields.description: Indicates whether the item is marked as important.

fields.name: scope
fields.description: Indicates the data's lifecycle and accessibility.

fields.name: lastAccessedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of the last access to the data.
